changes.value: Implement get_symbol operation with multi-tier fuzzy matching in swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/get_symbol.rs. Returns full source text of a symbol by name, searching across the whole indexed codebase with exact, suffix, case-insensitive, and fuzzy matching tiers.
